methods.name: Cued Graphical Authentication with Timing Intervals
methods.description: Graphical user authentication method that utilizes a cued recall-based approach and incorporates time intervals between clicks or taps to authenticate users. The user must remember both which parts of the image to click or tap and in what timing intervals.

authenticator.name: Graphical password and click/tap timing intervals

sources: @inproceedings{umarGraphicalUserAuthentication2012,  title = {Graphical User Authentication: {{A}} Time Interval Based Approach},  booktitle = {2012 {{IEEE International Conference}} on {{Signal Processing}}, {{Computing}} and {{Control}}},  author = {Umar, Mohammad Sarosh and Rafiq, Mohammad Qasim and Ansari, Juned Ahmad},  year = {2012},  month = mar,  pages = {1--6},  doi = {10.1109/ISPCC.2012.6224343}}
